theme: one factorization order for many sparsity patterns
title: One Pivot Order for K Sparsity Patterns: Shared-Separator Elimination
strategies: identity vertex order, ignore structure entirely (trivial)
dynamic minimum-degree elimination on the UNION of all K patterns' edges (greedy)
mine the edge INTERSECTION across all K patterns to recover the hidden shared separator hierarchy, then eliminate leaves-before-separators on that clean skeleton (strong)
true joint-optimal order across K noisy instances (NP-hard in general, open ceiling)
